safety_note: Public data only. No real funding partner names, private routing logic, affiliate links, apply links, private compensation data, private access details, borrower PII, or private review notes.
description: Public resource index for checklists, explainers, guides, and tools.

resources.summary: Learn the public funding families without partner-specific routing details.

resources.summary: Use the scorecard as a lead triage and document-readiness workflow.
